dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's got some strength, this guy.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He is powerful!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You... you mad?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What should I do?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's just sitting there grinning like it's not a big deal?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's stronger than I thought! This could get out of hand!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Beating him wouldn't be worth it, but if there's a chance that he lost, it would be a disaster!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Handsome guy is bad.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Should I teach him a lesson?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: If Vasco lost to him, it would be a disgrace to the Burn Knuckles!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: *Burn Knuckles - Architecture Class Crew

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: This is a lose-lose and so many eyes on us!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Here! I've decided to punish you!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I can't let Kim fight!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Haha! Yeah! So you thought he was someone else?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Yeah. Sorry. Nah, it happens. Jace Park?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What class are you? Fashion? Yep.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Jace, you don't need to worry.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh, so you are the new guy. Yep! We missed a show! Jace.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He isn't stupid.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Forget it and eat. Okay! Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Nice guy.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: The new guy is the real deal. He's hot. He stood up to Vasco!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's cool, sick.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'd like to be his friend. He's so sweet.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Wah! I want to get out of here.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, little guy, don't surrender to guys like that. Believe in yourself.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Okay. Hey, shut up and let's go eat. What's the menu?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: But who was the surrender talk aimed at?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: So cool. He's got it all wrong.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: But he called me little guy. How rude!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What a guy! Blah handsome; blah. They say he beat up Zack. Blah blah.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hmm, Daniel Park.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I don't really care but...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's handsome and kind. He's kinda funny, maybe he'll let me cut his hair?

dialogue.speaker: ELI
dialogue.line: Eli! Eli! Try this! Take a look at my hair, would ya?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: So, you mean we gotta get close with Daniel?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Yep, you saw him stand up to Vasco.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Vasco lifted you with one hand. Shut up!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Anyway, you think it's better if we get along?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Okay, and have him make up with Zack. Let's step up and make a move.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: But how?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What? A get-together?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Yep, it is the start of a new semester. We're having a get-together today. You should join.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Friends should get acquainted!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: A get-together! Valuable time for only friends! #It's not

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Finally, friends! How I've dreamed of this! Amusement Park, PC Room, Karaoke! Life with friends! I was so lonely!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Singing alone at home, searching for landmines alone, kneeling, walking with a dog. I've been so lonely till now!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You guys! See ya at 7. You can come, right? Come! You're good guys after all! So today it is!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Maybe we can take some sticker photos too.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: I can hang out for a couple hours. Okay, pics to stick on my phone! I can't believe it!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Thank God I have a day off. I'm sure it won't be a big deal to let my other body sleep longer.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Doo Lee has invited Yoo Han Park and Kay Jang. Go to Doo Lee's profile.

dialogue.speaker: DOO LEE
dialogue.line: Daniel, where were you at?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Hey Doo, I'm at Rodeo.

dialogue.speaker: KAY JANG
dialogue.line: LOL. Behind the lens, sho? Go into the alleyway.

dialogue.speaker: HAN PARK
dialogue.line: Come up to the second floor restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Okay, got it. Send.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: A chat room with friends... it's like a dream!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: My chat rooms used to be nothing but prisons.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHO KIM DIE? YOU WANNA... JANG JUNHO: Hehe. Loser. KIM: YOU GIANT KILL WILL... DLEJC: YOU CAN RUN, THINK. YOU LOSER, LEE. DEAD GUYS: YOU'RE SORRY. JANG JUNHO: That's fake. Anyways. KIM PANJOON: Bet you're gonna get your ass kicked. IAN KIM: Up? You say a lot. Yes or no? GLAN KIM: Please do more.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: I really wanted to die.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: But... is this the alley? Why would they wanna eat here?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: It's so run-down. And the restaurant is on the second floor?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: No way, is it... one of those hidden places for gourmets?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Decent restaurant with friends!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Let's eat, have fun and take some sticker pics, the kind you can stick on your phone! Cheese!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Behind these doors... are my friends!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Let's take a deep breath and go on in. Nervous, act natural. H-Hi!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh, you're here. But what caught my eye was... you're here?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It's Daniel! Sit down!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: An unpleasant, hazy place.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Danny, you don't need an ID here.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Sit beside me. This place is hard to find, eh?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Where nothing good was happening.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: What the f*ck? Why's he here?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hehe. Tada! Surprise! Come and sit~ You must be hungry.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I came myself and just happened to meet them.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It must be fate, right?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: How'd she know about this?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Look how she pushes up her breasts.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: I guess it's not bad.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Danny~ Sit here~

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: No, there's space next to Zack.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: F*ck, what are you guys up to?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: LOL. You bitch?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Alcohol? Is this okay?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Mom... what?

dialogue.speaker: PIG
dialogue.line: You there! Sit you!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: I felt like I was trespassing on a forbidden territory.

summary: Daniel Park gains popularity after standing up to Vasco, leading to an invitation to a 'get-together' with friends. Excited about finally having friends, he heads to the meeting spot, a run-down alley restaurant, where he encounters unexpected and potentially troublesome acquaintances.
